eval_source: Canonical from C:/ml-trm-work/checkpoints to use/machine 1/trm-mlp-sudoku-seed0/best.pt; HF-init from-scratch fine-tune, peak at epoch 900, see findings.md S1. Headline TRM-MLP Sudoku data point.
HF-eval-only of Sanjin2024 Sudoku-Extreme-mlp checkpoint; results/trm_official_sudoku_eval.json. Inference kWh; CO2/correct from findings.md S1.

Canonical from C:/ml-trm-work/checkpoints to use/machine 1/qwen-sudoku-seed0/; train log Fix-A artefact (val_cell 0.0000), eval_override.json records Fix-B 800-puzzle re-eval (0.190657 cell, cross-validated against 187840-puzzle partial 0.1913). viability gate passed.
Canonical from C:/ml-trm-work/checkpoints to use/machine 1/gpt2-sudoku-seed0/; trained with post-Fix-B trainer, train_log shows realistic slow rise. viability gate passed.

Canonical from C:/ml-trm-work/checkpoints to use/machine 1/smollm-sudoku-seed0/; trained with post-Fix-B trainer, train_log shows perfect S B.4 contract pattern (puzzle 0.000 across all epochs, cell rising 0.000 -> 0.1253 -> 0.1360 -> 0.1411). M1 9600-puzzle re-eval confirms 0.1407, matches epoch-30 to 0.04pp. viability gate passed.

Canonical from C:/ml-trm-work/checkpoints to use/machine 1/distill-qwen-sudoku-seed0/; 2.4M-param student, distilled from Qwen-0.5B teacher. cell_acc 0.3587 BEATS teacher's 0.1907 by 1.88x at 200x fewer params. NOTE: prior draft had 0.2578 - that figure was superseded; canonical archive value is 0.3587. viability gate passed.

HF-eval-only of Sanjin2024 Maze-Hard checkpoint; results/trm_official_maze_eval.json. Headline TRM-Att Maze number per findings.md S5.6 (mask_non_path metric-robust). No fine-tune in scope this sprint.

M1 post-fix re-eval 2026-04-28T00:27 of pre-existing Qwen Maze checkpoint with mask_non_path=false (1000 puzzles, full coverage). Pre-fix value was 1.000 puzzle (saturated by mask_non_path=true loophole) - SUPERSEDED. viability gate passed; calibration anchor for fleet maze re-evals.

M1 post-fix re-eval 2026-04-28T00:30 of pre-existing distill-qwen-maze checkpoint with mask_non_path=false (1000 puzzles, full coverage). Pre-fix value was 1.000 puzzle (same bug) - SUPERSEDED. Distill student inherits teacher's degenerate spam-path-marker strategy; cell_acc within 0.02pp of Qwen Maze teacher. viability gate passed.
